name: recoil_app_mission_fmv_state_constructor
description: RecoilApp_MissionFmvState::Constructor initializes the base state, embedded FMV script, mission fields, and mission-state vtable.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 86 unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 95 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 1 trailing VC NOP trimmed.
zFMV_Script::Init is Binary-safe, but this constructor still differs in caller-side state/vtable setup, mission-field stores, and cleanup shape.
The native smoke checks returned this pointer, final mission vtable, zeroed mission fields, and embedded FMV script initialization state.
